name: Pictured Rocks Virtual Golf Simulator
about: Pictured Rocks Virtual Golf Simulator is an indoor golf venue located in Munising, Michigan, offering year-round golf simulation experiences. The facility features virtual driving ranges and play on over 180,000+ virtual courses, with customization options for course conditions and players. It utilizes both TGC2019 and GSPro software for gameplay, with support for up to 8 players in various formats. The venue operates as part of a licensed Michigan Real Estate Company and includes a gift shop on-site. Pricing is structured on a per-hour basis with optional club rentals and a punch card discount for seniors.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 180,000+ virtual courses worldwide, including Pebble Beach
Premium GSPro software with 4K graphics and support for up to 8 players
Year-round indoor facility allowing golf practice during winter months
Customizable course conditions and player options for varied gameplay

food_and_drink.notes: Visitors can bring their own food and beverages
No mention of alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned in connection with their Eye XO club stickers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can rent clubs for $5 per session, but you are also welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and beverages to the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify a precise time for 18 holes, as it depends on the number of players, game format, and course chosen.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specifically mention kid-friendly features, but it offers family-oriented activities and leagues.
